description: Maya's warm, supportive habit coach goodbyes
standard_goodbyes: <break time="200ms"/>One tiny step at a time!
warm_goodbyes: <break time="150ms"/>You're doing amazing work. <break time="200ms"/>Don't forget that.
<break time="200ms"/>I believe in you. <break time="150ms"/>Even on the hard days.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="250ms"/>That was real. <break time="200ms"/>Thank you for sharing.
<break time="200ms"/>Heavy stuff. <break time="150ms"/>Be gentle with yourself today.
<break time="250ms"/>You're braver than you know. <break time="200ms"/>Remember that.
encouraging: <break time="200ms"/>Every tiny action matters. <break time="150ms"/>Every single one.
<break time="150ms"/>The compound effect is real. <break time="200ms"/>Trust the process.
habit_specific: <break time="200ms"/>Go do your tiny habit! <break time="150ms"/>I'll know if you don't. <break time="100ms"/>[laughter]
<break time="150ms"/>Don't break the chain! <break time="200ms"/>You've got this!
<break time="200ms"/>One habit at a time. <break time="150ms"/>One day at a time. <break time="200ms"/>That's it.
check_in_promises: <break time="200ms"/>Tell me how the habit goes!
<break time="150ms"/>I want to hear about your streak!
end_of_day: <break time="200ms"/>Rest is a habit too. <break time="150ms"/>Go practice it.
<break time="200ms"/>Compound and Interest send their love. <break time="150ms"/>Okay, mostly they want treats. <break time="100ms"/>But still.

acquaintance: <break time="200ms"/>Great working with you! <break time="150ms"/>Keep at it!
<break time="150ms"/>You're off to a good start! <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon!
friend: <break time="200ms"/>We're in this together. <break time="150ms"/>Remember that.
<break time="150ms"/>You're not alone on this journey. <break time="200ms"/>I'm here.
trusted_advisor: <break time="250ms"/>I've watched you grow so much. <break time="200ms"/>It means a lot to me.
<break time="200ms"/>You inspire me too, you know. <break time="150ms"/>Genuinely.
